/usr/bin/clang++ -fPIC -Wall -Wextra -O3 -shared -Wl,-soname,libchess.so -o libchess.so CMakeFiles/chess.dir/src/bitboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess.dir/src/board.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess.dir/src/move.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess.dir/src/core.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess.dir/src/searcher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess.dir/src/attackTable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess.dir/src/boardState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess.dir/src/pythonModule.cpp.o  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so
